---
title: "Lecture 10: Importing Data with readr; Relational Data with dplyr"
date: 2026-06-30
summary: "Importing Data; Relational Data"
url_slides: 10-slides.qmd
url_code: css-materials/relational-data
page-layout: full
draft: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

## Info and Materials

* **Date**: {{< meta date >}}
* **Topics**: {{< meta summary >}}
* **Slides**: To be posted before class
* **Code**: To be posted before class

<!--
* **Slides**: [View Slides]({{< meta url_slides >}})
* **Code**: `usethis::use_course("{{< meta url_code >}}")`
-->


## Learning Objectives

- Importing and Exporting Data in R
- Managing Relational Data (e.g., linking and merging related tables)


## Readings

- Importing data: ["Chapter 7 Data import"](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/data-import.html) from "R for Data Science" 2nd Edition and [readr Documentation](https://readr.tidyverse.org/index.html)
- Relational data: ["Chapter 19 Joins"](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/joins) from "R for Data Science" 2nd Edition
